candidates.why: This is a COGS-related amortization line, but it appears as a component within the cost of revenues section while the selected parent bucket is the full cost line 'Cost of Operating Revenue'. Adding it separately would likely double count because the selected COGS row already appears to include it.

This is a COGS-related depreciation line, but it appears as a component within the cost of revenues section while the selected parent bucket is the full cost line 'Cost of Operating Revenue'. Adding it separately would likely double count because the selected COGS row already appears to include it.

variables.notes: The selected COGS reference bucket is '[Income Statement] Cost of Operating Revenue', a full cost-of-revenue line. The visible amortization and depreciation rows appear to be sub-components of that operating cost bucket rather than separate same-level expenses to add later.

No SG&A-related depreciation or amortization row is visible in the operating section excerpt. The only explicit D&A rows shown are for cost of revenues, so there is nothing to add separately to the selected XSGA bucket '[Income Statement] Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses'.
